DATA DICTIONARY — E-COMMERCE DATABASE
========================================

This document describes the physical database schema implementing the e-commerce platform's data model. All tables are in the ECOM_SCHEMA schema unless otherwise noted.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Master record for all registered platform customers. Each row represents one customer account. This table contains the customer's core identity and account information.

Primary Key: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

Table Type: Transaction table (high frequency of reads and writes)

Retention: Customer records are retained for 7 years after last purchase, then archived.

Column Details:
  - CUST_ID (INT, PK, NOT NULL, AUTO_INCREMENT): Unique numeric identifier for the customer. System-generated sequential number starting from 100001.
  - FULL_NAME (VARCHAR(200), NOT NULL): Customer's full legal name. Combined first and last name. Used in order confirmations and shipping labels.
  - EMAIL (VARCHAR(150), NOT NULL, UNIQUE): Primary contact email address. Must be unique across all customers. Used for login and order notifications.
  - REGION_CODE (VARCHAR(10), NOT NULL): Geographic region code using ISO 3166-2 subdivision format. Examples: "US-CA" for California, "IT-25" for Lombardy. Used for tax calculation and routing.
  - CREATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp of account creation. Automatically set by the database.
  - IS_ACTIVE (BOOLEAN, NOT NULL, DEFAULT TRUE): Whether the customer account is active. Inactive customers cannot place new orders but historical data is preserved.
  - LAST_LOGIN (DATETIME, NULL): Timestamp of the most recent successful login. NULL for customers who have never logged in.
  - EMAIL_VERIFIED (BOOLEAN, NOT NULL, DEFAULT FALSE): Whether the customer's email address has been verified through confirmation link.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on CUST_ID
  - UNIQUE INDEX on EMAIL (idx_customer_email)
  - INDEX on REGION_CODE (idx_customer_region) for regional reporting
  - INDEX on IS_ACTIVE (idx_customer_active) for active customer queries
  - INDEX on CREATED_AT (idx_customer_created) for customer acquisition analytics

Foreign Keys: None (this is a master table)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the Customer business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Master catalogue of all products available for sale on the platform. Contains product master data including pricing, categorization, and status.

Primary Key: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment)

Table Type: Master data table (moderate frequency of reads, low frequency of writes)

Column Details:
  - PRODUCT_ID (INT, PK, NOT NULL, AUTO_INCREMENT): Unique numeric product identifier. System-generated.
  - SKU (VARCHAR(50), NOT NULL, UNIQUE): Stock Keeping Unit — human-readable product code. Format: 3-letter category code + 6-digit sequential number. Example: "ELE-001234". Used in barcodes and inventory systems.
  - PRODUCT_NAME (VARCHAR(300), NOT NULL): Full product title as displayed to customers. Includes brand, model, and key specifications.
  - CATEGORY_ID (INT, NOT NULL, FK -> TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID): The category this product belongs to. Determines navigation and search filters.
  - UNIT_PRICE (DECIMAL(10,2), NOT NULL): Current selling price per unit in EUR. Prices are updated daily based on market conditions.
  - IS_ACTIVE (BOOLEAN, NOT NULL, DEFAULT TRUE): Whether the product is currently listed for sale. Inactive products remain in database but are not displayed.
  - DESCRIPTION (TEXT, NULL): Detailed product description including features, specifications, and usage instructions. Displayed on product detail page.
  - WEIGHT_KG (DECIMAL(8,3), NULL): Product weight in kilograms. NULL for digital products. Used for shipping calculations.
  - CREATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp when product record was created.
  - UPDATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp of last product information update.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on PRODUCT_ID
  - UNIQUE INDEX on SKU (idx_product_sku)
  - INDEX on CATEGORY_ID (idx_product_category) for category browsing
  - INDEX on IS_ACTIVE (idx_product_active) for storefront queries
  - INDEX on UNIT_PRICE (idx_product_price) for price range searches
  - FULLTEXT INDEX on PRODUCT_NAME, DESCRIPTION (idx_product_search) for search

Foreign Keys:
  - CATEGORY_ID references TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the Product business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Header record for each customer sales order. One row per order. Contains order-level information including customer, dates, totals, and status.

Primary Key: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

Table Type: Transaction table (high frequency of inserts, moderate frequency of updates)

Retention: Order data retained for 10 years for compliance and analytics, then archived.

Column Details:
  - ORDER_ID (BIGINT, PK, NOT NULL, AUTO_INCREMENT): Unique order identifier. System-generated sequential number.
  - CUST_ID (INT, NOT NULL, FK -> CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID): The customer who placed the order. All orders must be associated with a registered customer.
  - ORDER_DATE (DATE, NOT NULL): Date the order was placed. Determines order aging and fulfillment priority.
  - TOTAL_AMT (DECIMAL(12,2), NOT NULL): Total monetary value of the order including all line items, taxes, and shipping. Cannot be negative.
  - STATUS_CODE (VARCHAR(20), NOT NULL, DEFAULT 'PENDING'): Order status. Valid values: 'PENDING', 'CONFIRMED', 'PROCESSING', 'SHIPPED', 'DELIVERED', 'CANCELLED'. Status workflow enforces business rules.
  - DELIVERY_ADDRESS_ID (INT, NULL, FK -> CUST_ADDRESS.ADDRESS_ID): The delivery address for this order. Must be a valid address belonging to the order's customer.
  - BILLING_ADDRESS_ID (INT, NULL, FK -> CUST_ADDRESS.ADDRESS_ID): The billing address for this order. Must be a valid address belonging to the order's customer.
  - PAYMENT_METHOD (VARCHAR(50), NULL): Payment method used. Examples: 'CREDIT_CARD', 'PAYPAL', 'BANK_TRANSFER'.
  - PAYMENT_CONFIRMED_AT (DATETIME, NULL): Timestamp when payment was confirmed. NULL for unpaid orders.
  - SHIPPED_AT (DATETIME, NULL): Timestamp when order was shipped. NULL for unshipped orders.
  - DELIVERED_AT (DATETIME, NULL): Timestamp when order was delivered. NULL for undelivered orders.
  - CREATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp when order was created.
  - UPDATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp of last order update.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on ORDER_ID
  - INDEX on CUST_ID (idx_order_customer) for customer order history
  - INDEX on ORDER_DATE (idx_order_date) for date-based reporting
  - INDEX on STATUS_CODE (idx_order_status) for order fulfillment queries
  - INDEX on (CUST_ID, ORDER_DATE) composite index for customer order sorting

Foreign Keys:
  - CUST_ID references CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)
  - DELIVERY_ADDRESS_ID references CUST_ADDRESS(ADDRESS_ID)
  - BILLING_ADDRESS_ID references CUST_ADDRESS(ADDRESS_ID)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the SalesOrder business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Individual product lines within a sales order. Each row represents one product on an order with quantity and price details. A sales order must contain at least one line item.

Primary Key: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

Alternate Key: (ORDER_ID, LINE_NUMBER) - unique combination

Table Type: Transaction table (high frequency of inserts, rarely updated)

Column Details:
  - LINE_ID (INT, PK, NOT NULL, AUTO_INCREMENT): Unique line item identifier. System-generated.
  - ORDER_ID (BIGINT, NOT NULL, FK -> SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID): Parent order. Each line item belongs to exactly one order.
  - LINE_NUMBER (INT, NOT NULL): Sequential line number within the order (1, 2, 3, ...). Used for display order.
  - PRODUCT_ID (INT, NOT NULL, FK -> TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID): The product ordered. References the product master for current product information.
  - QUANTITY (INT, NOT NULL): Number of units ordered. Must be positive integer. Validated against available inventory.
  - UNIT_PRICE (DECIMAL(10,2), NOT NULL): Price per unit at time of order. This is the historical price, not current price. Important for order accuracy and returns.
  - LINE_AMT (DECIMAL(12,2), NOT NULL): Extended amount for this line item. Calculated as QUANTITY × UNIT_PRICE.
  - PRODUCT_NAME_AT_ORDER (VARCHAR(300), NULL): Product name as it appeared when the order was placed. Preserved for historical accuracy if product name changes.
  - CREATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp when line item was created.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on LINE_ID
  - UNIQUE INDEX on (ORDER_ID, LINE_NUMBER) (idx_line_order_num)
  - INDEX on ORDER_ID (idx_line_order) for order line retrieval
  - INDEX on PRODUCT_ID (idx_line_product) for product sales analytics
  - INDEX on (ORDER_ID, PRODUCT_ID) composite index for order product lookup

Foreign Keys:
  - ORDER_ID references SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
  - PRODUCT_ID references TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the OrderLineItem business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Hierarchical product category tree. Categories organize products for navigation, search, and reporting. Supports multi-level hierarchy.

Primary Key: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment)

Table Type: Master data table (low frequency of changes)

Column Details:
  - CATEGORY_ID (INT, PK, NOT NULL, AUTO_INCREMENT): Unique category identifier. System-generated.
  - CATEGORY_NAME (VARCHAR(200), NOT NULL): Human-readable category name. Displayed in navigation menus and search filters.
  - PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (INT, NULL, FK -> TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID): Parent category. NULL for root-level categories. Forms the category hierarchy.
  - CATEGORY_PATH (VARCHAR(1000), NULL): Full category path for display. Example: "Electronics > Computers > Laptops". Computed by trigger.
  - SORT_ORDER (INT, NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0): Display order within sibling categories. Lower numbers appear first.
  - IS_VISIBLE (BOOLEAN, NOT NULL, DEFAULT TRUE): Whether category is visible in storefront navigation. Hidden categories exist for organizational purposes.
  - CREATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp when category was created.
  - UPDATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp of last category update.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on CATEGORY_ID
  - INDEX on PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (idx_category_parent) for hierarchy queries
  - INDEX on CATEGORY_NAME (idx_category_name) for category search
  - INDEX on IS_VISIBLE (idx_category_visible) for storefront queries

Foreign Keys:
  - PARENT_CATEGORY_ID references TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) (self-referential)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the Category business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUST_ADDRESS
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Delivery and billing addresses for customers. Supports multiple addresses per customer with type designation and primary selection.

Primary Key: ADDRESS_ID (INT, auto-increment)

Table Type: Transaction table (moderate frequency of reads and writes)

Column Details:
  - ADDRESS_ID (INT, PK, NOT NULL, AUTO_INCREMENT): Unique address identifier. System-generated.
  - CUST_ID (INT, NOT NULL, FK -> CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID): Owning customer. All addresses must belong to a registered customer.
  - ADDRESS_TYPE (VARCHAR(20), NOT NULL): Type of address. Valid values: 'DELIVERY', 'BILLING'. Determines usage in orders.
  - STREET (VARCHAR(300), NOT NULL): Street address including house number and street name. May include apartment or suite information.
  - CITY (VARCHAR(100), NOT NULL): City name. Used for routing and regional analysis.
  - STATE_PROVINCE (VARCHAR(100), NULL): State or province name. Optional, used for countries with state/province divisions.
  - POSTAL_CODE (VARCHAR(20), NOT NULL): Postal or ZIP code. Validated against country-specific formats.
  - COUNTRY_CODE (CHAR(2), NOT NULL): ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Examples: 'US', 'IT', 'GB', 'DE'. Used for shipping and tax calculation.
  - IS_PRIMARY (BOOLEAN, NOT NULL, DEFAULT FALSE): Whether this is the customer's primary address. Only one address of each type can be primary per customer. Enforced by application logic.
  - CREATED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp when address was added.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on ADDRESS_ID
  - INDEX on CUST_ID (idx_address_customer) for customer address retrieval
  - INDEX on (CUST_ID, ADDRESS_TYPE) composite index for typed address lookup
  - INDEX on (CUST_ID, IS_PRIMARY) composite index for primary address lookup

Foreign Keys:
  - CUST_ID references CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the CustomerAddress business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
INVENTORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Real-time stock levels per product per warehouse location. Each row represents the inventory count for one product in one warehouse.

Primary Key: INVENTORY_ID (INT, auto-increment)

Alternate Key: (PRODUCT_ID, WAREHOUSE_CODE) - unique combination

Table Type: Transaction table (very high frequency of reads and updates)

Column Details:
  - INVENTORY_ID (INT, PK, NOT NULL, AUTO_INCREMENT): Unique record identifier. System-generated.
  - PRODUCT_ID (INT, NOT NULL, FK -> TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID): The stocked product. References product master.
  - WAREHOUSE_CODE (VARCHAR(20), NOT NULL): Warehouse location identifier. Examples: 'WH-EU-01', 'WH-US-NY'. References warehouse master table in logistics system.
  - QUANTITY_ON_HAND (INT, NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0): Number of units currently in stock. Updated in real-time with order confirmations and restocking. Cannot be negative.
  - REORDER_LEVEL (INT, NOT NULL, DEFAULT 10): Minimum quantity before reorder is triggered. When quantity falls below this level, automatic reorder notification is sent.
  - REORDER_QUANTITY (INT, NOT NULL, DEFAULT 100): Standard reorder quantity. Suggested quantity for restocking orders.
  - LAST_UPDATED (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp of last stock level update. Used for inventory synchronization.
  - LAST_COUNTED_AT (DATETIME, NULL): Timestamp of last physical inventory count. NULL if never counted manually.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on INVENTORY_ID
  - UNIQUE INDEX on (PRODUCT_ID, WAREHOUSE_CODE) (idx_inventory_product_warehouse)
  - INDEX on PRODUCT_ID (idx_inventory_product) for total product inventory queries
  - INDEX on WAREHOUSE_CODE (idx_inventory_warehouse) for warehouse stock reports
  - INDEX on QUANTITY_ON_HAND (idx_inventory_quantity) for low stock queries

Foreign Keys:
  - PRODUCT_ID references TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the Inventory business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TB_WAREHOUSE
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Master table of warehouse locations. Defines physical storage facilities where inventory is stored and from which orders are fulfilled.

Primary Key: WAREHOUSE_CODE (VARCHAR(20))

Table Type: Master data table (low frequency of changes)

Column Details:
  - WAREHOUSE_CODE (VARCHAR(20), PK, NOT NULL): Unique warehouse location identifier. Human-readable code. Examples: 'WH-EU-01', 'WH-US-NY'.
  - WAREHOUSE_NAME (VARCHAR(200), NOT NULL): Full warehouse name. Example: 'European Distribution Center - Milan'.
  - STREET (VARCHAR(300), NOT NULL): Street address of the warehouse facility.
  - CITY (VARCHAR(100), NOT NULL): City where warehouse is located.
  - STATE_PROVINCE (VARCHAR(100), NULL): State or province.
  - POSTAL_CODE (VARCHAR(20), NOT NULL): Postal code.
  - COUNTRY_CODE (CHAR(2), NOT NULL): ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.
  - IS_ACTIVE (BOOLEAN, NOT NULL, DEFAULT TRUE): Whether warehouse is currently operational. Inactive warehouses do not receive new inventory.
  - OPENED_DATE (DATE, NOT NULL): Date when warehouse began operations.
  - MANAGER_NAME (VARCHAR(200), NULL): Name of warehouse manager.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on WAREHOUSE_CODE
  - INDEX on COUNTRY_CODE (idx_warehouse_country) for regional warehouse lookup
  - INDEX on IS_ACTIVE (idx_warehouse_active) for active warehouse queries

Foreign Keys: None (this is a master table)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the Warehouse business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TB_REGION
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: Geographic regions for tax calculation, shipping routing, and reporting. Regions represent sales territories and operational zones.

Primary Key: REGION_CODE (VARCHAR(10))

Table Type: Master data table (rarely changes)

Column Details:
  - REGION_CODE (VARCHAR(10), PK, NOT NULL): Unique region identifier. ISO 3166-2 subdivision format. Examples: 'US-CA', 'IT-25', 'DE-BW'.
  - REGION_NAME (VARCHAR(200), NOT NULL): Human-readable region name. Example: 'California', 'Lombardy', 'Baden-Württemberg'.
  - COUNTRY_CODE (CHAR(2), NOT NULL): ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Links region to country.
  - TAX_RATE (DECIMAL(5,4), NOT NULL, DEFAULT 0.0000): Default tax rate for this region. Expressed as decimal (0.2000 = 20%). Can be overridden at product level.
  - DEFAULT_WAREHOUSE (VARCHAR(20), NULL): Default warehouse for orders in this region. Used for order routing.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on REGION_CODE
  - INDEX on COUNTRY_CODE (idx_region_country)
  - INDEX on DEFAULT_WAREHOUSE (idx_region_warehouse)

Foreign Keys:
  - DEFAULT_WAREHOUSE references TB_WAREHOUSE(WAREHOUSE_CODE)

Business Concept Mapping: This table stores the Region business concept.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SYS_AUDIT_LOG
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Description: SYSTEM TABLE — Records all data modification events for compliance auditing. This is a technical table with no direct business concept mapping. Should NOT be mapped to business concepts in the knowledge graph.

Primary Key: LOG_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

Table Type: System log table (append-only, high volume)

Retention: Log entries retained for 2 years, then archived to cold storage.

Column Details:
  - LOG_ID (BIGINT, PK, NOT NULL, AUTO_INCREMENT): Unique log entry identifier. System-generated sequential number.
  - ACTION_TYPE (VARCHAR(50), NOT NULL): Type of database operation. Valid values: 'INSERT', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'.
  - TABLE_NAME (VARCHAR(100), NOT NULL): Name of the affected table. Exact table name from schema.
  - RECORD_ID (VARCHAR(100), NOT NULL): Primary key of the affected record, stored as string. Used to identify the specific record that changed.
  - CHANGED_BY (VARCHAR(100), NOT NULL): Username or system identifier that performed the change. 'SYSTEM' for automated processes.
  - CHANGED_AT (DATETIME, NOT NULL, DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP): Timestamp of the change. Captured at time of database operation.
  - OLD_VALUES (JSON, NULL): Previous values for UPDATE and DELETE operations. Contains complete row data before change. NULL for INSERT operations.
  - NEW_VALUES (JSON, NULL): New values for INSERT and UPDATE operations. Contains complete row data after change. NULL for DELETE operations.
  - IP_ADDRESS (VARCHAR(45), NULL): IP address of the client that made the change. NULL for system operations.
  - SESSION_ID (VARCHAR(100), NULL): Database session identifier. Used for grouping related changes.

Indexes:
  - PRIMARY KEY on LOG_ID
  - INDEX on TABLE_NAME (idx_audit_table) for table-specific audit queries
  - INDEX on CHANGED_BY (idx_audit_user) for user activity tracking
  - INDEX on CHANGED_AT (idx_audit_timestamp) for time-based audit reports
  - INDEX on (TABLE_NAME, RECORD_ID) composite index for record history queries

Foreign Keys: None (this is a system table)

Business Concept Mapping: None — this is a technical system table for compliance only.

════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

RELATIONSHIP SUMMARY
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Primary Key → Foreign Key Relationships:

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  ├── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID
  └── CUST_ADDRESS.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID
  └── INVENTORY.PRODUCT_ID

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID

SALES_ORDER_HDR.DELIVERY_ADDRESS_ID → CUST_ADDRESS.ADDRESS_ID
SALES_ORDER_HDR.BILLING_ADDRESS_ID → CUST_ADDRESS.ADDRESS_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

TB_WAREHOUSE.WAREHOUSE_CODE
  ├── INVENTORY.WAREHOUSE_CODE
  └── TB_REGION.DEFAULT_WAREHOUSE

TB_REGION.REGION_CODE
  └── CUSTOMER_MASTER.REGION_CODE

════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Business Concept      → Physical Table(s)
────────────────────────────────────────────
Customer             → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product              → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder           → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem        → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category             → TB_CATEGORY
CustomerAddress      → CUST_ADDRESS
Inventory            → INVENTORY
Warehouse            → TB_WAREHOUSE
Region               → TB_REGION

Technical/No Mapping → SYS_AUDIT_LOG
